cvin.bio

75% of resumes never reach a human.

Not 50%. Not 60%. Three out of four.

Your carefully written resume gets uploaded into an ATS. A robot scans it for keywords. Doesn't find the right ones. Rejects it. In 3 minutes.

Nobody read it. Nobody saw your experience. Nobody cared about the formatting you spent 4 hours on.

A PDF sits in a folder. A link gets shared.

A PDF gets filtered by bots. A link gets clicked by people.

A PDF can't tell you who viewed it. A link shows you exactly who looked, when, and for how long.

Turn your CV into a live link. Takes 2 minutes. Free.

Make your CV a link →

Free. No credit card. Takes 2 minutes.

cvin.bio — your CV, as a link.
